summary: Comprehensive testing of AutoSEO webhook integration and Blog SEO fields. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All 12 frontend tests passed. Features working: double Bearer token auth, single Bearer auth, invalid token rejection, test event URL response, full article creation with deduplication, Blog CRUD with SEO fields (slug, meta_title, meta_description, schema_markup), Helmet SEO rendering on blog posts.

design_issues.issue: HTML tags showing in excerpt on blog listing cards when content is HTML - line 69 shows raw HTML tags instead of stripped text

backend_passed: POST /api/autoseo/webhook full article creates blog post with correct fields
POST /api/blog creates post with SEO fields
PUT /api/blog/{id} with title change auto-generates slug
GET /api/blog/{slug} retrieves post with all SEO fields
POST /api/blog/login with valid credentials returns token
GET /api/blog/verify with valid token returns success
frontend_passed: Blog Admin login page loads at /resources/blog/admin
Blog Admin login with marketing@merchantsolutionscorp.com / Mscpay$1 works
Blog Admin dashboard shows post editor
SEO Settings section visible in editor
Creating post with SEO fields saves correctly
Blog post page renders meta_title in <title>
Blog post page renders meta_description in <meta>
Blog post page renders schema_markup as JSON-LD
Blog post page renders OG tags
Blog post page renders canonical URL
HTML content renders properly (not as raw text) via dangerouslySetInnerHTML

action_items: LOW: Strip HTML tags from excerpt display on blog listing page (Blog.jsx line 69) - when content is HTML, excerpt shows raw tags
critical_code_review_comments: server.py autoseo_webhook (line 369-526): Correctly handles both 'Bearer Bearer <token>' and 'Bearer <token>' via split()[-1]
server.py update_content_post (line 263-275): Only auto-generates slug from title if no explicit slug is provided
Blog.jsx BlogPost (line 124-138): Helmet correctly configured with meta_title, meta_description, keywords, og tags, and schema_markup JSON-LD
Blog.jsx line 155-161: HTML content properly rendered using dangerouslySetInnerHTML with isHtml() check
BlogAdmin.jsx handleSave (line 98-117): Correctly sends slug, meta_title, meta_description, schema_markup to backend
BlogAdmin.jsx SEO Settings section (line 254-282): All SEO fields have data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Test posts created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AutoSEO webhook at POST /api/autoseo/webhook working with Bearer token auth (both single and double prefix). Blog CRUD with SEO fields (slug, meta_title, meta_description, schema_markup) working. Blog Admin UI at /resources/blog/admin has SEO Settings section with all fields. Blog post pages render SEO tags via react-helmet-async. Minor issue: blog listing page shows raw HTML tags in excerpt when content is HTML (Blog.jsx line 69).
rca_of_issue: N/A - All tests passed. Previous Bearer token 401 issue was fixed by using split()[-1] to extract token from Authorization header.
